docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKIEL, MARIUSZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LESNY, ADAM DEFENDANT DOES NOT HAVE THE POWER TO BIND OLIVE CONSTRUCTION AND COULD NOT HAVE AGREED THAT OLIVE CONSTRUCTION WOULD PAY PLAINTIFF A REFERRAL FEE. PLAINTIFF BELIEVED OTHERWISE, BUT THE LAW DOES NOT FIND A CONTRACT HERE UNLESS OLIVE CONSTRUCTION RATIFIED IT AND THE PLAINTIFF HAS OFFERED NO EVIDENCE THAT OLIVE CONSTRUCTION DID SO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED AUG-27-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LESNY, ADAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN PLAINTIFF MARIUSZ MARKIEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADAM LESNY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,905.00 FILED BY MARKIEL, MARIUSZ AS TO DEFENDANT LESNY, ADAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
